fn process_items(items: &[Item]) -> f64 {
    // GOOD: chain iterator directly without intermediate collection
    let filtered: Vec<f64> = items
        .iter()
        .filter(|i| i.in_stock)
        .map(|i| i.price)
        .collect();

    let total: f64 = filtered.iter().sum();
    total / filtered.len() as f64
}

struct Item {
    name: String,
    price: f64,
    in_stock: bool,
}
